texto: I've never been one to be too careful with my diet. If I really start watching what I eat, I'm already a thin guy - I just won't have any physical strength. I think I'll disappear if I don't eat what I need to eat or what I like to eat.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Daniel Nestor: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I've never been one to be too careful with my diet. If I really start watching what I eat, I'm al…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, start, diet pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de diet e think.

frase_original: I've never been one to be too careful with my diet. If I really start watching what I eat, I'm already a thin guy - I just won't have any physical strength. I think I'll disappear if I don't eat what I need to eat or what I like to eat.
